General.Name: VCREDIT Holdings Ltd
General.Description: VCREDIT Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides technology-driven consumer financial services to borrowers in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company offers credit card balance transfer and consumption credit products. It also provides business process outsourcing, money lending, loan facilitation, microcredit, guarantee, financial leasing, asset management, advertising agency, cross-border agency, technology, and other financial services, as well as CreFIT cash loan, a financing solution for short-term liquidity needs. VCREDIT Holdings Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Two Pacific Place, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
